parsedJson.summary: The design relies on a Google Business Profile-style layout that feels like a temporary placeholder rather than a professional business website, lacking clear calls to action and visual hierarchy.

issues.title: No visible 'Get a Quote' button above the fold
issues.what_observed: The hero section contains a logo and a small 'Open 6:30 AM - 7:00 PM' badge, but there is no primary button inviting the user to contact the business or request a quote.
issues.why_problem: A local search visitor is looking for a solution to a leak or damage. Without a clear button like 'Get a Free Quote' or 'Call Now', they have to hunt for contact info, increasing the chance they will bounce to a competitor who makes it easier.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A large, high-contrast button (e.g., bright orange or yellow) centered below the logo saying 'Get a Free Quote' or 'Call Now', visible without scrolling.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a primary Call-to-Action (CTA) button in the hero section immediately below the logo. Ensure it links to the phone number or a contact form.
issues.plain_explanation: 网站顶部缺少明显的“联系我们”或“获取报价”按钮。访客第一眼看到后，不知道该如何开始合作。
issues.customer_impact: 这会导致大量潜在客户流失。研究表明，如果访客在3秒内找不到联系方式，他们很可能会离开。对于急需修屋顶的客户，这直接意味着订单被竞争对手抢走。

issues.title: Logo uses generic purple background instead of custom imagery
issues.what_observed: The top section features a logo placed on a solid, flat purple background with a generic house outline graphic.
issues.why_problem: This looks like a default template or a social media profile header rather than a professional roofing company website. It fails to show the quality of work or the scale of the business.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A high-quality photograph of a restored roof or a team member working, with a dark overlay and white text, or a clean white background with a professional logo.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the solid purple background with a high-resolution photo of a completed roof restoration project or a professional team shot to build immediate trust.
issues.plain_explanation: 目前的紫色背景看起来像是一个通用的模板，而不是专业的装修公司网站。它没有展示任何实际的工作成果。
issues.customer_impact: 缺乏真实感会降低信任度。客户更倾向于选择那些展示真实案例和团队照片的公司，因为这证明了他们的专业能力。

issues.title: Dense text block discourages reading on mobile
issues.what_observed: The main content area starts with a large block of text describing 'DINO from FIX MY ROOF...' with small font size and tight line spacing.
issues.why_problem: Mobile users scan content; they do not read paragraphs. A wall of text feels overwhelming and makes it hard to quickly find key services like 'pressure washing' or 'repainting'.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Short, scannable bullet points or icons representing services (e.g., 'Roof Restoration', 'Leak Repair', 'Colorbond Roofing') with brief descriptions.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Break the text into a grid of service cards with icons and short titles. Keep the detailed description for a 'About Us' section or expandable accordion.
issues.plain_explanation: 大段文字在手机屏幕上很难阅读，客户通常会直接跳过。这让他们无法快速了解你们提供的具体服务。
issues.customer_impact: 如果客户无法在5秒内找到他们需要的服务，他们就会离开。将服务列表化可以提高信息获取效率，从而增加咨询量。

issues.title: Cookie banner blocks content on mobile
issues.what_observed: A large black cookie consent banner covers the bottom left of the screen, obscuring part of the content.
issues.why_problem: On mobile, this banner takes up significant screen real estate, pushing important content down and creating a cluttered, unprofessional first impression.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A slim, non-intrusive banner at the bottom or top that does not obscure the main content, or a delayed popup that appears after a few seconds.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Implement a less intrusive cookie consent mechanism that respects the user's screen space and does not block the view of the website content.
issues.plain_explanation: 底部的黑色弹窗遮挡了部分内容，让页面显得杂乱无章，影响用户体验。
issues.customer_impact: 虽然这是法律要求，但过于突兀的设计会让用户感到烦躁，甚至直接关闭页面。优化弹窗设计可以减少这种负面情绪。

positive_observations: Clear business name and specialization in the text.
Operating hours are visible in the hero section.
Mention of '5 star reviews' helps build social proof.
redesign_priorities: 1. Add a prominent 'Get a Free Quote' button in the hero section.
2. Replace the generic purple background with a high-quality image of a roof restoration project.
3. Convert the dense text block into a scannable list of services with icons.
